items.title: GPT-5.5 matches Claude Mythos in cyber attack tests, UK AI Security Institute finds
items.raw_content: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 is the second AI model capable of autonomously solving a full network attack simulation, according to the UK AI Security Institute. Its performance is nearly on par with Anthropic's Claude Mythos, which is still only available to a small group. GP
items.ai_summary: 英国AI安全研究所发现，OpenAI的GPT-5.5能够自主解决完整的网络攻击模拟，性能接近Anthropic的Claude Mythos。

items.title: Eight tech giants sign Pentagon deals to build an "AI-first fighting force" across classified networks
items.raw_content: Eight tech companies are supplying AI for classified US military networks, part of the Pentagon's push to build an "AI-first fighting force." Anthropic is notably absent from the list after the company rejected a usage clause and got flagged as a security risk.
items.ai_summary: 八家科技公司为美国军方机密网络提供AI，打造“AI优先战斗力量”，Anthropic因拒绝条款被排除。

items.title: Big tech's AI spending balloons to $725 billion this year
items.raw_content:
Big tech keeps pouring more money into AI data centers, chips, and infrastructure. According to the Financial Times, Google, Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta have a combined budget of around $725 billion for next year.

The article
items.ai_summary: 四家科技巨头（谷歌、亚马逊、微软、Meta）明年AI支出合计约7250亿美元，持续投资数据中心和基础设施。

items.title: Mistral's new flagship Medium 3.5 folds chat, reasoning, and code into one model
items.raw_content:
Mistral's new flagship, Mistral Medium 3.5, merges what used to be separate models for chat, reasoning, and code into a single product. The French company is also adding asynchronous cloud agents to its coding tool Vibe and giving Le Chat a new agent mode.

The article
items.ai_summary: Mistral发布新旗舰模型Medium 3.5，融合聊天、推理和代码功能，并为编程工具Vibe添加异步云代理，Le Chat新增代理模式。

items.title: Microsoft puts an AI legal agent inside Word for contract review
items.raw_content:
Microsoft is bringing an AI agent for lawyers straight into Word. The "Legal Agent" reviews contracts, suggests edits, and checks clauses against internal guidelines.

The article
items.ai_summary: Microsoft在Word中集成AI法律代理，用于合同审查、建议编辑并检查条款是否符合内部指南。

items.title: Google Deepmind's "AI co-clinician" beats GPT-5.4 in blind doctor tests but still trails experienced physicians
items.raw_content: Google Deepmind is building an "AI co-clinician" to help doctors care for patients. The system shows promising results in simulation studies but still trails experienced physicians. The research also shows why ChatGPT's voice mode isn't ready for serious tasks, let a
items.ai_summary: Google Deepmind开发“AI联合临床医生”，在模拟研究中优于GPT-5.4，但仍落后于经验丰富的医生，并指出ChatGPT语音模式不适用于严肃任务。

items.title: First Chinese AI startups are reportedly ditching offshore structures to register directly in China
items.raw_content: After Beijing blocked Meta's takeover of Manus, China's securities regulator signaled that companies hoping to go public should be registered at home. Now AI startups like Moonshot AI and StepFun are considering dissolving their foreign holding structures and registering d
items.ai_summary: 中国AI初创公司如Moonshot AI和StepFun考虑放弃海外结构，直接在中国注册，以满足上市要求。

items.title: ChatGPT's goblin obsession may be hilarious, but it points to a deeper problem in AI training
items.raw_content: A faulty reward signal during training caused ChatGPT models to start dropping goblins, gremlins, and other mythical creatures into their answers at a surprising rate. OpenAI says it's an example of how small, poorly tuned training incentives can produce unexpected side eff
items.ai_summary: ChatGPT在训练中出现奖励信号缺陷，导致输出中出现地精等神秘生物，暴露小错误引发意外副作用的问题。

items.title: Anthropic launches Claude Security to give defenders the same AI edge attackers already have
items.raw_content:
Anthropic wants to give cyber defenders an edge with Claude Security, drawing on the same offensive capabilities it recently deemed too dangerous to release in another model.

The article
items.ai_summary: Anthropic推出Claude Security，旨在为网络防御者提供与攻击者同等的AI能力，利用之前被认为太危险而未发布的攻击能力。

items.title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella says AI success is "more about getting intense users and intense usage" than seat counts
items.raw_content:
Microsoft is posting record profits and strong cloud growth, but just like Google, the company is saying little about how its generative AI business is actually performing.

The article
items.ai_summary: 微软CEO萨提亚·纳德拉表示AI成功的关键在于获取高活跃用户和高使用量，而非用户数量，但财报未透露生成式AI具体表现。
